title: Daily Memo: France-Japan Meeting, Russia-Armenia Talks
author: Geopolitical Futures
summary:
Minerals cooperation. France and Japan signed a roadmap to cooperate on critical minerals during French President Emmanuel Macron’s visit to Tokyo. The two countries also agreed to secure supplies for a rare earths refinery in southern France in which a Japanese state-owned firm is an investor. The refinery is due to begin operations later this […]

The post Daily Memo: France-Japan Meeting, Russia-Armenia Talks appeared first on Geopolitical Futures.
full_text:
Minerals cooperation. France and Japan signed a roadmap to cooperate on critical minerals during French President Emmanuel Macron’s visit to Tokyo. The two countries also agreed to secure supplies for a rare earths refinery in southern France in which a Japanese state-owned firm is an investor. The refinery is due to begin operations later this […]

Geopolitical Futures (GPF) was founded in 2015 by George Friedman, international strategist and author of The Storm Before the Calm and The Next 100 Years. GPF is non-ideological, analyzes the world and forecasts the future using geopolitics: political, economic, military and geographic dimensions at the foundation of a nation.
